nodes.name: Ceara woodcreeper
nodes.summary: Ceara woodcreeper（Ceara woodcreeper，学名 Xiphorhynchus atlanticus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于原始森林、次生林、Caatinga，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Caatinga
nodes.summary: Caatinga是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联56种鸟类，包括白腹拟䳍、黄腿穴䳍、White-browed guan等56种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits humid forest, both primary and secondary and also relict patches of brejos de altitude in the Caatinga

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits humid forest, both primary and secondary and also relict patches of brejos de altitude in the Caatinga

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits humid forest, both primary and secondary and also relict patches of brejos de altitude in the Caatinga

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The principal threats are forest loss and degradation due to urbanisation, conversion to agriculture and selective logging." "Fairly common to common, but very few data on overall abundance, and its ability to adapt to fragmented or otherwise degraded areas is imperfectly known."
